headline: Cathie Wood's ARK Says AMD Chips 'Can Already Be More Performant Per Dollar' Than Nvidia
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) is positioning itself to challenge Nvidia Corp.‘s (NASDAQ:NVDA) long-standing dominance in the lucrative AI accelerator market. According to a fresh analysis released by Cathie Wood‘s ARK Invest, internal research reveals that AMD chips “can already be more performant than Nvidia chips” per dollar on select workloads, highlighting a massive shift in data center cost efficiency. The CPU Playbook Applied to GPUs ARK Invest’s Director of Research, AI & Cloud

headline: Chips Made In The USA Are Making A Comeback. What Investors Should Know.
summary: Semiconductor manufacturing was dominated by American companies before factories moved to countries like Taiwan and South Korea.  Now, hints of that original vigor are emerging again as a fab construction boom promises to revive what once was the global standard: computer chips made in the USA.  "Today, all of the major semiconductor manufacturers capable of building a state-of-the-art semiconductor are investing in the United States," said Joe Stockunas, president of the Americas unit of the SEMI industry trade group.

content.title: Chips Made In The USA Are Making A Comeback. What Investors Should Know.
content.summary: Semiconductor manufacturing was dominated by American companies before factories moved to countries like Taiwan and South Korea.  Now, hints of that original vigor are emerging again as a fab construction boom promises to revive what once was the global standard: computer chips made in the USA.  "Today, all of the major semiconductor manufacturers capable of building a state-of-the-art semiconductor are investing in the United States," said Joe Stockunas, president of the Americas unit of the SEMI industry trade group.

headline: Price Prediction: Can Intel Double by 2030?
summary: Intel’s turnaround is starting to look real. Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) has ripped 198.75% year to date, and CEO Lip-Bu Tan just posted a sixth consecutive quarter of revenue above expectations. Data Center and AI revenue grew 22% year over year to $5.05B, Foundry grew 16%, and 18A is in high-volume manufacturing. Can Intel double from here ... Price Prediction: Can Intel Double by 2030?
